rationale: Gov't Code §2001.225 governs Alcoholic Beverage Code appeals and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2001.225. CERTAIN ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGE CODE APPEALS. Section 2001.176(b)(1) does not apply to an appeal under Section 32.18, Alcoholic Beverage Code.
_note: Rule text concerns alcoholic beverage appeals; no relevance to proposed homestead exemption change.
